## International Potato Center {{< fa seedling >}}{.slide-project-cip .section-end}

Study yield and nutrient values from agricultural trials in Peru.

::: notes
PROJECT: you'll be exploring agricultural data from the **International Potato Center** (ICP). With each week's lessons, we'll be building techniques to get better at asking and exploring what characteristics drive ideal outcomes like production, quality, and nutrient value.

The process we're following will be pretty clear once we get into it. By working on this project over multiple weeks, you'll **<i>gain skills</i>** as you **<i>apply them</i>**, all the while **<i>practicing</i>** as you go. ✻
:::
